result.summary: The page is mostly recognizable, but several elements appear clipped or inconsistent, suggesting viewport/overflow and navigation-state issues.

issues.description: Several horizontally scrollable sections are clipped at the right edge. The top category tab shows only part of “Hot Ga…”, and the game rows show partially cut-off cards in the third column.
issues.suggestion: Ensure horizontal carousels have clear scroll affordance and proper padding, or adjust the responsive layout so cards/tabs fit cleanly within the viewport.

issues.description: The bottom navigation appears to highlight “POKER” as the active section, while the visible page content is casino/home game content.
issues.suggestion: Update the active navigation state so it matches the current page, likely highlighting “CASINO” or “HOME” instead of “POKER”.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the lower game cards, partially hiding content at the bottom of the screen.
issues.suggestion: Add sufficient bottom padding to the scrollable content area so cards are not obscured by the fixed navigation bar.

issues.description: Some labels on partially visible cards, such as “EXCLUSIVE,” are cut off at the edge, making the section look unfinished.
issues.suggestion: Add right-side spacing or use carousel snapping so partial cards are intentionally and consistently displayed.
